name: ds4cc
description: Read-only guidance for discovering reviewed DS4CC plugins and installing them with Codex after source review.

interface.shortDescription: Review DS4CC plugins and Codex install steps
interface.longDescription: Documentation-only skill for reviewing the public DS4CC marketplace, registering its Git repository with Codex, and choosing qualified plugin install commands. It never installs or executes software automatically.
defaultPrompt: Show me how to add the DS4CC marketplace to Codex.
List the reviewed DS4CC plugins and their capabilities.
Show the Codex command for a DS4CC plugin without running it.
